cases.title: MRI Prior Authorization Decision Drift
cases.description: MRI lumbar spine prior authorization changed from APPROVED (January) to DENIED (June). Root cause: policy gene mutation introduced specialist review requirement; documentation gene mutation shows specialist review was not submitted.
cases.expected_root_cause: Policy updated to require specialist review (MRI-MED-NEC-v2). Specialist review not submitted. Documentation gap caused denial.

timeline_events.event: Original PA submitted and approved under MRI-MED-NEC-v1
Policy updated to MRI-MED-NEC-v2 — specialist review now required
Rule updated to RULE-PA-v5 — specialist review validation added
PA resubmitted — denied under MRI-MED-NEC-v2 due to missing specialist review

cases.title: Claim Payment Decision Drift
cases.description: Specialist office visit claim changed from PAID (February) to REJECTED (June). Root cause: provider moved out of network (contract gene mutation), and referral ID now required but missing (rule gene mutation).
cases.expected_root_cause: Provider PROV-450 terminated from BlueSelect PPO effective 2026-04-30. Claim rule updated to require referral ID for specialist visits. Referral ID not submitted.

timeline_events.event: Claim submitted and paid — provider in-network, rules satisfied
Claim rule updated to RULE-CLM-v4 — referral ID now required
Provider PROV-450 contract terminated from BlueSelect PPO
Policy updated to CLM-REIMB-v6 — enhanced validation
Claim resubmitted — rejected: provider out-of-network, referral ID missing

cases.title: Provider Network / Contract Decision Drift
cases.description: Provider network status changed from ACTIVE/IN_NETWORK (March) to TERMINATED/OUT_OF_NETWORK (June). Root cause: contract gene mutation due to network tier restructuring. Continuity of care flag requires human review.
cases.expected_root_cause: BlueChoice HMO network restructured. Provider PROV-680 did not meet new tier requirements. Contract terminated effective 2026-05-14. Continuity of care obligations pending.

timeline_events.event: Provider active and in-network under CONTRACT-P680-v1
Contract terminated — BlueChoice HMO network restructured
Network status confirmed TERMINATED — continuity of care review pending
